stemHtml: Select the option that states correctly how the following numbers are to be transmitted in a radio message: Squawk 2400, altitude 2400 ft.

options.a: Squawk two four zero zero, altitude two four zero zero.
options.b: Squawk two thousand four hundred, altitude two four zero zero.
options.c: Squawk two four zero zero, altitude two thousand four hundred.
options.d: Squawk two thousand four hundred, altitude two thousand four hundred.
